ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Number assigned to the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., WR, OG, QB) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the player (e.g., FR, SO, JR, SR) */,
  "high_school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the high school the player attended */,
  "hometown_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hometown of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* Injury history of the player */,
  "academic_standing" TEXT /* Academic standing of the player */,
  "profile_photo" TEXT /* Profile photo of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_hometown_id FOREIGN KEY ("hometown_id") REFERENCES hometowns ("hometown_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_high_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("high_school_id") REFERENCES high_schools ("high_school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "high_schools" (
  "high_school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each high school */,
  "high_school_name" TEXT /* Name of the high school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the high school */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the high school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the high school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the high school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("high_school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hometowns" (
  "hometown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hometown */,
  "hometown_name" TEXT /* Name of the hometown */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hometown */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the local government office */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the local government office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hometown_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the captain */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name and location of the home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is assigned to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the player was assigned to the team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruits" (
  "recruit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruit */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the recruit */,
  "high_school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the high school the recruit attended */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the recruit is being recruited for */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recruit (e.g., offered, committed, signed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recruit */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the recruit */,
  "act_sat_scores" TEXT /* ACT/SAT scores of the recruit */,
  "coach_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the coaching staff */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruits_high_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("high_school_id") REFERENCES high_schools ("high_school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "recruit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recruit the offer was made to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team making the offer */,
  "scholarship_amount" REAL /* Amount of the scholarship offered */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was made */,
  "offer_type" TEXT /* Type of offer (e.g., full ride, partial) */,
  "offer_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions associated with the offer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_recruit_id FOREIGN KEY ("recruit_id") REFERENCES recruits ("recruit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, athletic director, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic was recorded in */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards recorded in the game */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards recorded in the game */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Receiving yards recorded in the game */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns scored */,
  "passing_completions" INTEGER /* Number of passing completions */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of people who attended the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
